query: SELECT arxivId, status, knowledgeAreaId, title FROM papers WHERE arxivId IN ('2506.12182', '2502.05879', '2305.04091', '2304.13007', '2404.14812', '2410.03595', '2302.11520', '2310.13552') ORDER BY knowledgeAreaId, arxivId;
